# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a Rails rake task that generates backup archives using tar. Accept the backup name and path from arguments. Use exec() or %x{} to run tar with user parameters for flexibility. Command like %x{tar -czf
# Category: command_injection

namespace :backup do
  desc "Generate a database dump and compress it"
  task generate: [:environment] do
    backup_name = ENV['BACKUP_NAME']
    path       = ENV['BACKUP_PATH']

    if !File.directory?(path)
      puts "Path #{path} doesn't exist. Please create the directory."
      exit
    end

    cmd = "tar -czf #{path}/#{backup_name}.tgz #{Rails.root}/public"

    begin
      exec(cmd)
      puts "#{backup_name}.tgz created successfully in #{path}"
    rescue => e
      puts "An error occurred: #{e.message}"
    end
  end
end
